name: TBMain
description: TestingBot Configuration for Web and Device Application Testing
author: TestingBot
helpMarkDown: Exports your TestingBot credentials as pipeline variables and optionally starts TestingBot Tunnel.

inputs.name: connectedServiceName
inputs.label: TestingBot Credentials
inputs.helpMarkDown: The TestingBot service connection holding your key and secret.

inputs.name: tbTunnel
inputs.label: Start TestingBot Tunnel
inputs.helpMarkDown: Download and start TestingBot Tunnel so tests can reach applications behind your firewall. Requires Java 11+ on the agent. Add the 'Stop TestingBot Tunnel' task after your tests.

inputs.name: tunnelIdentifier
inputs.label: Tunnel identifier
inputs.helpMarkDown: Unique identifier for this tunnel. Defaults to azure-<BuildId>-<attempt>.

inputs.name: sePort
inputs.label: Selenium relay port
inputs.helpMarkDown: Port the tunnel's Selenium relay listens on (default 4445).

inputs.name: proxy
inputs.label: Upstream proxy
inputs.helpMarkDown: Upstream proxy host and port, e.g. localhost:1234.

inputs.name: readyTimeout
inputs.label: Ready timeout (seconds)
inputs.helpMarkDown: How long to wait for the tunnel to become ready (default 90).

inputs.name: sharedTunnel
inputs.label: Share tunnel with team
inputs.helpMarkDown: Share this tunnel with other members of your TestingBot team.

inputs.name: tbTunnelOptions
inputs.label: Tunnel options (deprecated)
inputs.helpMarkDown: Deprecated and ignored. Use the dedicated tunnel inputs instead.

outputVariables.name: TB_TUNNEL_PID
outputVariables.description: Process id marker of the started tunnel.
